description:
Build a 24/7 AI personal assistant with MiniMax Agent — connects to Gmail, Google Calendar, and 200+ tools via Composio. Includes free quick-start pack.

In this full review and tutorial, I build a personal AI assistant from scratch using MiniMax Agent's desktop app, then deploy it to MaxClaw — their always-on cloud — so it runs 24/7 without my laptop open. By the end, I have an assistant that sends me a morning briefing every day via Telegram with my emails triaged, calendar ready, and a PDF research report attached.

Here's what I cover: building a custom app in 90 seconds (video transcriber), connecting Gmail and Google Calendar through Composio with zero code, deploying the assistant to MaxClaw for always-on access, using the Experts Marketplace and Skills Hub (Word, Excel, PDF, PowerPoint), and the M2.7 model powering it all — benchmarked right behind Claude Opus at a fraction of the cost.

MiniMax Agent works as both a local desktop app (privacy-first, files stay on your machine) and a cloud workspace via MaxClaw. The M2.7 model is built in — no separate API keys, no per-token billing. Free tier available, paid Agent Plans start at $16/month.

TIMESTAMPS:
0:00 - AI Assistant Morning Briefing Demo
0:40 - What Is MiniMax Agent
1:15 - Desktop App: Build Apps & Research Reports
3:00 - Composio Setup: Gmail & Google Calendar Integration
5:30 - MaxClaw: Deploy Your Assistant to the Cloud 24/7
8:00 - Experts Marketplace & Skills Hub
8:30 - M2.7 Model: Benchmarks & Performance
9:30 - Agent Plan Pricing & Final Thoughts

Composio: https://composio.dev
